extraction.one_line_summary: BUITRAGO Santiago won stage 19 after catching HEALY in final 1.5km; ROGLIC attacked Thomas inside final kilometer, gained 3 seconds via CORT's wheel.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC changed to mountain bike gearing (single ring, 44t cassette) specifically for Tre Cime, signaling prepared all-in attack.
ROGLIC attacked Thomas inside final kilometer but used CORT breakaway rider as draft shield to secure 3-second gap.
Breakaway formed only after first hour ridden at 50kph, suggesting GC teams initially wanted controlled race despite final MTT tomorrow.
THOMAS countered inside final 200m only after ROGLIC move, suggesting defensive posture rather than seeking bonus seconds proactively.

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: bike equipment change to extreme climbing setup shows confidence attacking steep gradients despite prior injuries this Giro
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: waited until final 200m to counter rather than attacking first, defensive mindset with only 26s lead before final MTT
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: negative: marked out of KOM jersey fight by GIRMAY blocking tactics, then caught by BUITRAGO with 1.5km remaining
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: negative: lost almost a minute to THOMAS/ROGLIC group on Tre Cime, eliminated from GC podium contention
rider_signals.ARENSMAN Thymen: positive: moved into top ten GC by supporting THOMAS effectively then finishing with leaders group
